summary: Started the new non-first-batch objective line and classified the material-plan family as the first representative secondary flow. Repository rules and runtime evidence both show a clean boundary: PM/executive/business_admin can use the draft material-plan flow, while finance remains read-only or denied on create.

notes: The material-plan family is currently classified cleanly as a secondary flow rather than a new authority residual.
Runtime currently has no real submit/pending material-plan samples, so this batch only covers entry and draft-create surfaces.

next_step: Continue the non-first-batch objective with a second representative family audit covering BOQ import, task-from-BOQ, execution-structure, and progress-entry surfaces.
